title: asplenium ruta-muraria nothosubsp. baldense
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria nothosubsp. baldense, also known as the wall-rue fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The wall-rue fern has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and it is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have a range of therapeutic effects, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
